pi_items.source: Web search and WebFetch verification of live website
Domain extracted from target_url and verified by web access
Task configuration - valid file path consistent with setup_task.sh
Task configuration - valid file path consistent with setup_task.sh
WebFetch of https://books.toscrape.com/ showing '1000 results' and 50 pages with 20 books each
Official sitemaps.org protocol specification - standard XML sitemap namespace version 0.9

privileged_info_summary: The task targets books.toscrape.com, a real public website containing approximately 1,000 books across 50 pages. The expected minimum URL count of 20 is conservative given the site has ~1,000 URLs. The standard XML sitemap namespace (http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9) is correctly specified. The task requires using Screaming Frog SEO Spider to crawl this website and generate an XML sitemap filtered to include only HTML pages, saved to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/sitemaps/sitemap.xml, along with a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/sitemap_summary.txt containing the domain name, total URL count, and date.
